review_title: Engaging tool for your cold-mailing efforts
description: Overall I love Luna and use it at a minimum several times a week.
author: Alban T.
pros: I love the very idea itself. There area lot of tools for cold-mailing, but Luna pares it down to the essentials, making it fun and easy to just send e-mails. Its slightly gamified workflow makes it fun to connect every day and send a dozen ails or two, and do it consistently day-in, day-out. That's what I really love here: not mass-sending 10k e-mails once in a while, but being compelled to send a few personalized mails on a daily basis.In my industry, this is gold.
cons: Internationalization of copy, well... sucks, let's be honest. For English it's great, but for French it's a pain.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great tool; relevant leads, good AI-written emails suggested
description: Very positive. Little to no comments, sometimes emails are written half in Dutch (my default language) and English, only drawback.
author: Carl V.
pros: - Relevant leads at relevant companies - Good adaption by AI-text writing tool for emails. Corrections are taken into account when generating next email
cons: Non, actually all works convenient. Sometimes emails are written half in Dutch (my default language) and English, only drawback.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Makes Outreach easy
description: GetLuna has shown itself to be a potent tool for any business looking to enhance its lead generation and management capabilities. I am thrilled to be a user and am eager to see how it can help drive my business to new heights.
author: Jake C.
pros: tilizing GetLuna has been a delightfully simple process. The platform's ease of use and straightforward interface make it incredibly user-friendly, which has made a significant difference in my productivity. Beyond its ease of use, GetLuna has successfully generated high-quality leads with no email bounces. This is a testament to the platform's quality and efficiency.One of the aspects I am particularly impressed with is GetLuna's extensive parameters for selecting contacts and businesses. It is truly comprehensive and meticulously designed. You can filter by a variety of criteria, from industry type to business size and even revenue. This level of detail in segmentation allows me to reach out to a highly targeted audience, which maximizes my efforts and ensures the leads I receive are most relevant to my business.The ability to get so granular with selecting industries and potential contacts is extraordinary. It gives me the power to tailor my outreach exactly to my needs, saving me time and increasing the effectiveness of my lead generation. It is an innovative approach that far surpasses the conventional methods I have previously used.
cons: o far, I haven't received any responses from my initial outreach attempts. However, I've recently upgraded my plan and am optimistic about giving it another try. I'm hopeful that this step will enhance the effectiveness of my communication efforts.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Lead generation and prospecting made easy
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I really love Luna and I'm glad I got it on a lifetime deal (I hope they offer it again because I can definitely get more people to purchase). Luna is super easy to use and very helpful in finding leads or finding emails for our uploaded list. The customized cold email copy is a great time saver! No need to research and generate first line and it also learns as my team use it. So awesome! I also love that there's a follow up feature so I don't have to worry on when to do the follow up. plus excited for the upcoming new features from Luna. The best!
cons: I hppe there's a way to filter leads according to technology used. That would save me tons instead of me paying another platform to pull my leads and upload them to Luna. Also, I really want to see Luna extending it's lead generating feature by allowing us to just upload website leads without the name and they'll find the emails for us. Super crossing my finger for those features.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: One of the best purchases I made in 2022
description: Luna helps make lead gen easy to incorporate, I just have to follow up on the emails. And, they have introduced me to other tools that have become invaluable.
author: Mary Ann M.
pros: This is so easy to use and the team continues to improve the capabilities and search for quality leads.
cons: None really, the AI for writing continues to improve. And anytime I find a bug, they are 100% responsive.
author_profession: As a MindSet/Life Coach/Executive Recruiter I help you breakthough mental barriers
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: 🤩Luna nails it!
description: As a start-up our biggest challenge is prospecting new clients. Luna helps solve this problem. We can spend more time working with our existing user base and less on folks who are not interested in our product.
author: ▪ Tamela ▪ S.
pros: 1. Luna has an extensive lead database in exactly the right B2B target audience.2. Luna "listens" to me and seems to update her performance on-the-fly, from email to email. She's magic!3. The autonomous mode is a must. Once Luna is trained, we unleashed her full potential by letting her automate the email marketing campaign. It is like having another sales person on staff. 🥳
cons: The FAQs are OK. Can't find every answer in there yet. Looking forward to the autonomous mode Chat feature.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: review
description: so far I like it.
author: Jack A.
pros: so far I like that it automates the SDR.
cons: it's too expensive. You shoudl have a much cheaper rate to start, like $20/month.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Scale personalization!
description: I love it! 10/10 for me. I can push out 20-30 1:1 emails a day and review each one prior to send. It does a lot of heavy lifting for a solo founder like myself. I have seen responses, and booked a few meetings leveraging Luna. Highly recommend to give it a spin.
author: Tom S.
pros: The ease of scaling my outreach but in a way that is 1:1 to the reader. Its not perfect but damn near close in writing engaging, simple, and personalized emails. It has a desktop app and a mobile app which I love!
cons: I don't have much feedback beyond I wish we could automate it. You do need to pop in and approve each message. I do believe it is on their roadmap though.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Ai SDR you actually can use...
description: very positive, and would recomend to others as a means of finding more leads and a first touch point. I great prospecting tool for an real SDr to supercharge their output
author: Bruce👨🏻‍💻 B.
pros: Great for finding leads and creating a simple drip sequence of emails. The email copy training does work too
cons: Email management and integration with CRM not as strong as it could be
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Wow-I love it
description: I was impressed from the start, and customer service has been great, very thorough and responsive
author: Michael V.
pros: I was surprised at how well the AI customized the emails for me. I thought there would have to be a lot more training.
cons: nothing yet, my only small suggestion is to have the ability to edit the send schedule
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great experience
author: Oleg M.
pros: Save my time and make marketing efforts easier and more accessible.
cons: Early to say.Waiting for the first results
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: A great email prospecting tool that writes the email
description: It worked from day one.
author: Jeffrey L.
pros: Luna does the prospecting and emails for you, just hit send.
cons: I'd like it to send the emails. Or at least the follow ups. Prospect tracking and CRM integrations lacking.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Your virtual office worker who handles the mailings
description: This is truly the "all-in-one" tool I've been looking for for a long time. I find and receive verified leads, help with text content and good help to keep track of my mailings. A smart product that keeps getting better!
author: Patrik K.
pros: Our main reasons for using Luna are- the help to find new leads- resourceful AI engine that helps us produce simple and fast background facts about the recipient- keeps track of when it is time to send out follow-up emails- reliable recipient verification
cons: - I want to be able to cancel a sent email that is in an outgoing queue. Did I make a typo or miss some important information?- I want to be able to group my mailings to different recipient groups, with a different perspective on the AI engine's text suggestions
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: The Game-Changing AI Technology for Prospecting and Winning More Deals
description: As a sales leader, I was tired of automated messages that never got any responses. But Luna's AI technology has changed the game for me. With Luna, I can send personalized emails to high-quality leads that perfectly match my proposition. The best part is, Luna does the copywriting for me, making prospecting easy, fun, and effective.
author: Randall B.
pros: The AI technology that SDRs and Business Owners love for winning more deals is a standout feature. Luna's AI technology suggests high-quality leads every day and generates personalized emails for cold outreach. This feature helps businesses focus on quality rather than quantity in their email campaigns, leading to better response rates and increased chances of winning deals. Additionally, Luna's ability to learn and improve from every interaction with prospects sets it apart from other sales prospecting tools.
cons: Luna's features and capabilities use of AI technology for suggesting new high-quality leads and sending personalized emails is one of its strongest features. - I can't think of anything I dislike about the software
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Great AI prospecting tool
description: Great-- it's a wonderful way to do prospecting without the usual headaches most of which are time consuming of pyschological barriers.
author: Steven G.
pros: Luna is a breeze to start with - it has broken the barrier that comes with doing outreach. The UX is lovely and makes using Luna fun. If you've got a tool you like, you're more likely to use it.
cons: The database still needs improvement - but they are improving all the time. You can also upload your own database anyway. The AI will improve too - it is not quite 100% in some regards and you have to keep training it to do what you want. It's like any AI Tool right now - you still need an element of human touch!
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: I'm glad I purchased it, I'm not 100% sold, but where it's heading is powerful
description: I'm VERY happy with my purchase as I trust the direction Luna is going. Should be a 5/5 product very soon.
author: Justin W.
pros: I love that it writes emails for me, and comes with a seemingly accurate-enough database.
cons: I feel like training Luna is SOMETIMES hit or miss - and I wish it would just learn "instantly" some of the base thigns I want it to say. Also, sometimes that 'icebrakers" or "conversation starters" are mediocre, but I thhink this will get better with time.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Good value and support but not entirely perfect yet
description: I am more inclined to recommend it than not, but still a long way to go.
author: Rudra S.
pros: The interface is good. Luna's support functions are quite nice. The chat emails have a genuine feel to them. Lead generation is superb!
cons: Sometimes there is no description about the company, so one has to go into the company's website, which is cumbersome and wastes time...it sometimes suggests irrelevant email drafts.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: YouVerify Uses Luna in Semi-Automated but Automated way
description: Needs more features, additional statistics and reports, needs to integrate urgently with salesforce
author: Dimitri K.
pros: Luna has an unbelievable algorithm of identifying the right target personas, the right companies. once you learn it during the evaluation process prior to the autonomous version, it will clearly show that. Perhaps in the first 40 emails and targeted needs a bit of training but there after you will forget to log in because it just works.
cons: The target audience and leads generation
author_profession: Chief Exec Global Expansion and Go To Market EEMEEA, APAC
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Fantastic tool
description: In general is good, I love the app.
author: Diego V.
pros: I discovered the Luna app by chance, and since then it has been an extremely useful tool that saves me a lot of time!
cons: I have had some email bouncing back. I don't know whether this can be imporved. Maybe Luna's oubound emails show problems with their SPF or DKIM settings.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Shoot for the Moon with your prospecting.
description: Overall its been a great experience with luna. The best ai personalised prospecting tool around.
author: Nigel H.
pros: Once you have set Luna up, everything is pretty much automatic.It's a great tool to send personalised emails to grow your business.Every sales manager should be getting the Salesforce to use this.
cons: Requires some monitoring, but this is necessary really.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: Great tool to get started with AI driven lead generation
description: We want to generate a steady flow of lead generation and we believe that GetLuna is going to help us with this.
author: Sjors V.
pros: It's very simple to use, not expensive and easy to implement.
cons: As it has very few options which makes it is easy to use, but also limits you in a very tailored approach
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Amazing Product
author: Elena B.
pros: Getting leads from Luna is amazing! Makes my work a breeze and its so simple. Perfect solution
cons: Getting leads from Luna is amazing! Makes my work a breeze and its so simple. Perfect solution

review_title: Really cool use of AI
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Ease of use, do minimal set up and get results with a click of a button.
cons: Follow ups and first emails are mixed together making it difficult to see where you are in a sequence
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Amazing capabilities
description: This is helping us optimize our sales efforts and save critical time since we can now handoff the redundant sales emails to Luna.
author: Sean M.
pros: You can train Luna's AI to meet your exact needs when sending email campaigns, it's very helpful.
cons: It's difficult to gain insight into where the Luna software is finding the emails and being able to understand the accuracy of the emails it has/
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Luna is killer
description: Fast, easy, exciting. I'm highly interested in using this long term.
author: Geoffrey W.
pros: The interface is easy to get started with. The systems and intergrations are straight forward. I was able to start sending outbound messages pretty much immediatly. Excited to see results.
cons: I'm still exploring the features of Luna, but at first glance it appears as if their list of intergrations and SMTP capabilities is small. Time will tell.
